rationale: The evidence is limited to a single DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.47.2.215) with no in-text citation snippet or reference details, so the use type cannot be verified. Although both papers are in online directed-network settings, the cited paper’s focus (seller-network accessibility and revenues) differs from the citing paper’s dyadic overlap/content-sharing hazard model, making substantive relevance possible but not clearly demonstrable from current evidence.
